title: Bornadi Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Bornadi Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Assam

overview.short: Bornadi Wildlife Sanctuary is a 26.22 km2 (10.12 sq mi) wildlife sanctuary situated on the foothills of Himalayas bordering Bhutan in the north and in Udalguri district and Baksa D
overview.description: Bornadi Wildlife Sanctuary is a 26.22 km2 (10.12 sq mi) wildlife sanctuary situated on the foothills of Himalayas bordering Bhutan in the north and in Udalguri district and Baksa District of Assam, India. This sanctuary was named after the river Bornadi which flows on its western border. It is 30 km (19 mi) from Tangla town and 130 km (81 mi) from Guwahati. The sanctuary was established in 1980 to protect the hispid hare (Caprolagus hispidus) and pigmy hog (Porcula salvania).

topPlaces.name: Bhangtar
topPlaces.description: Samdrupcholing, formerly known as Bhangtar, is a rural town, Yenlag Thromde, in the southeast of Bhutan. It is located in Samdrup Jongkhar District, close to the border with India.

topPlaces.name: Bangalipara
topPlaces.description: Bangalipara is a village in Baksa District, Bodoland Territorial Region, Assam situated in north bank of river Brahmaputra. It falls on the foothills of Bhutan with the border area at a 6 km approx.

items.note: Samdrupcholing, formerly known as Bhangtar, is a rural town, Yenlag Thromde, in the southeast of Bhutan. It is located in Samdrup Jongkhar District, close to the border with India.
Bangalipara is a village in Baksa District, Bodoland Territorial Region, Assam situated in north bank of river Brahmaputra. It falls on the foothills of Bhutan with the border area at a 6 km approx.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bornadi Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bornadi Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bornadi Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport, Guwahati (79 km) and the nearest railway station is Guwahati Railway Station (69 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bornadi Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bornadi Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bornadi Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Bornadi Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bornadi Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhangtar, Bangalipara.
